################################################################################
# c3_batch_ab.txt — C2->C3 promotion fanout (FIRST batch of the C2->C3 phase)
#
# Generated by the promote-c3-batch skill, 2026-06-04.
# Work type:   C2 -> C3 (author reimpl -> Frida bit-identity A/B -> re-classify).
# Sessions:    6  (worktree-isolated; per-session branch c3/batch-ab-s<N>)
# Model:       Sonnet 4.6 (claude-sonnet-4-6) — hard cap 8 RVAs/session.
#              NOT Opus high-throughput: the viable pure-leaf pool sized to 40
#              (see HONEST SIZING below), so per-session K is 6-8 — Sonnet's
#              comfortable range, ~3-4x cheaper than Opus, which only pays off
#              at K>=10. (User asked for high-throughput; the data did not
#              support 60 viable candidates without padding, which the v4 filter
#              exists to prevent.)
# Total RVAs:  40  (25 audio + 14 util + 1 fastcall_reg canary)
#
# *** THIS BATCH ALSO RE-VALIDATES TWO NEW HARNESS PIECES ***
#  1. run_diff_warm.py (warm-pool diff runner) — USE IT for verification, not
#     run_diff_parallel.py. It boots N MASHED instances ONCE and streams every
#     hook's force-call through them (boot paid N times, not K times). The
#     instances get titled/minimizable borders (d3d9 shim) so you can arrange
#     them; minimize/restore is safe (intro-skip patch applied).
#  2. fastcall_reg arg_type (new in diff_template.js) — exercised by the canary
#     0x004a1790 in session 6. If that hook diffs GREEN, fastcall_reg is
#     validated and unblocks ~93 more __fastcall candidates for future batches.
#     Until then, treat fastcall_reg as PROVISIONAL.
#
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# HONEST SIZING / why 40 not 60
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# The c3_filter_v4 survey passed 2240 nominal candidates, but the arg_type column
# was 'unknown' for all (the C1->C2 plates never recorded a harness signature),
# so harness-expressibility could not be filtered statically. Two subagents read
# all 121 audio/boot/util PURE-LEAF notes end-to-end and classified them:
#   - audio: 25 VIABLE / 54. The other 29 are DirectSound/DirectShow COM-method
#            thunks (need a live initialized COM interface -> a synthetic force-
#            call AVs) + a few ole32/kernel32 library thunks + 5 inline-[UNCERTAIN]
#            blockers (U-6707/7115/7124/7137/7204).
#   - util:  14 VIABLE / 21. SKIPs: 4 Tick/dispatchers (NOT real leaves — 13-41
#            callees, live-state) + 3 MSVC CRT (__strtok/__alldiv/__allmul).
#   - boot:  0 VIABLE / 46. The entire boot pure-leaf pool is the msvc-crt band
#            (bucket_005c1d63: _strncpy/_rand/_localtime/__beginthread/...). These
#            are RECLASS-OUT material (third-party-library[msvc-crt]), NOT C3
#            reimpl targets — queue a separate library-tagging pass, do NOT
#            promote them.
# Padding to 60 would mean shipping un-promotable RVAs to workers — exactly the
# c3_batch_h failure mode (3/6 sessions landed 0). 40 high-confidence candidates
# is the correct size.
#
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PER-SESSION PROTOCOL (identical for every session — read once)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Skills: hook-author, diff-original, re-classify.
# Worktree binding (top of every session):
#     NAME=c3-batch-ab-s<N>; BRANCH=c3/batch-ab-s<N>
#     git worktree add ".worktrees/$NAME" -b "$BRANCH"
#     cd ".worktrees/$NAME"
# Pre-flight:
#   1. git worktree list | grep c3-batch-ab-s<N>
#   2. sha256sum original/MASHED.exe.unpatched == BDCAE093A30FBF226BDD852B9C36798A987AEE33B3AE82BF7404B0336EFD3C0E
#      (MASHED.exe itself is patched — the anchor lives on .unpatched. Do NOT
#      "fix" a patched-exe SHA mismatch.)
#   3. cmd /c mashedmod\build.bat  must succeed clean BEFORE adding any hook.
# Per function (repeat, ONE commit at end):
#   a. Read re/analysis/<note> END-TO-END. Confirm: callees_depth1 == [] (these
#      are all pre-vetted pure leaves), no inline [UNCERTAIN] in the body, and
#      the signature maps to the arg_type in the candidate table (the suggested
#      arg_type is a STARTING POINT — confirm against the note + an existing
#      C3 hook of the same arg_type in hooks_registry.py; for audio list-ops
#      prefer the audio_list_insert/remove/drain family over int_pair if the
#      note shows a seeded-linked-list contract).
#   b. If the signature does NOT map to a supported arg_type, STOP — append a
#      note to re/PROMOTION_QUEUE.md asking for a harness extension; do NOT
#      invent an arg_type in this session. Skip that candidate.
#   c. Author the reimpl: mashedmod/src/mashed_re/<Subsystem>/<Cluster>.cpp
#      (one cluster file per session — see each session's "Reimpl file").
#      extern "C" __declspec(dllexport) <ret> __cdecl <Name>(<args>) { ... }
#      RH_ScopedInstall(<Name>, 0x00xxxxxx);  Cite RVA + disasm + no-guessing
#      source lines in the header comment (copy an existing C3 hook's style).
#   d. Append "%SRC%\<Subsystem>\<Cluster>.cpp" ^  to mashedmod\build.bat.
#   e. Append a hooks_registry.py entry: rva, export, signature, arg_type,
#      lut_root_delta=0, path1_tests (>=8 vectors incl. edge cases: 0, MAX,
#      sign bit, alternating bits; for ptr/struct arg_types the harness seeds
#      a scratch buffer — provide the field offsets the note cites), path2_tests.
#   f. cmd /c mashedmod\build.bat > log\build_<rva>.txt 2>&1  — halt on failure.
# Verification (ONCE, after all hooks authored) — USE THE WARM RUNNER:
#     py -3.12 re/frida/run_diff_warm.py <hook1> <hook2> ... --slots 4
#   Expect all GREEN (100% bit-identical). RED -> debug that hook only, rebuild,
#   re-run. cat log/diff_<hook>.csv to confirm the match column is all True.
#   (run_diff_warm spawns up to 4 bordered MASHED windows — arrange/minimize as
#   needed; they're killed on exit.)
# Promotion: invoke re-classify ONCE with all the session's GREEN RVAs. It writes
#   hooks.csv C3 rows, resolves STUBS, bumps note frontmatter, appends CHANGELOG.
# Commit (this worktree only, ONE commit):
#   "c3: <subsystem> batch ab session <N> — <K> hooks, evidence cited"
#   Do NOT merge to main. Append ONE row to re/PROMOTION_QUEUE.md:
#   <YYYY-MM-DD>  c3-batch-ab-s<N>  rvas=0x..,0x..  branch=c3/batch-ab-s<N>  evidence=log/diff_<hook>.csv;...  note=<one-line>
# STOP-AND-ASK if: anchor mismatch; clean-worktree build fails (main broken);
#   a note contradicts hooks.csv; >2 candidates need a caller drift-promote.
#
# FOLLOW-UP (after all 6 commit): invoke frida-sweep from main — it merges the 6
#   branches (resolving build.bat / hooks_registry.py / CHANGELOG.md conflicts),
#   rebuilds the canonical .asi, and runs the INTEGRATION diff (run_diff_warm
#   over ALL promoted hooks in the merged build). Lands only if every hook GREEN.
################################################################################


================================================================================
Session 1 — audio_c3_ab1  (C2->C3, 7-function batch)   [Audio/AudioLeaves_ab1.cpp]
================================================================================
Model: Sonnet 4.6 (claude-sonnet-4-6) — hard cap 8 (this session: 7)
Worktree: .worktrees/c3-batch-ab-s1/  (branch c3/batch-ab-s1)
Reimpl file: mashedmod/src/mashed_re/Audio/AudioLeaves_ab1.cpp

# Candidates
| RVA        | name         | analysis note                                              | arg_type (confirm)   | reimpl sketch |
|------------|--------------|------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------|---------------|
| 0x005ac540 | FUN_005ac540 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005ab710_005af040/0x005ac540.md   | int_scalar/ptr-scratch | uint f(p1) = (*(byte*)(p1+0x54)&8)>>3; seed scratch +0x54 |
| 0x005ade60 | FUN_005ade60 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005ab710_005af040/0x005ade60.md   | audio_list_*/int_pair  | int f(anchor,key): circular list (next@+4,key@+8) find-index/-1 |
| 0x005aded0 | FUN_005aded0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005ab710_005af040/0x005aded0.md   | ptr_nonnull_check      | int f(anchor): circular list (next@+4) node count |
| 0x005ae4c0 | FUN_005ae4c0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005ab710_005af040/0x005ae4c0.md   | int_with_out_ptr       | uint f(block,size,align): arena free-list(@+8,end@+0xc) first-fit splice |
| 0x005ae590 | FUN_005ae590 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005ab710_005af040/0x005ae590.md   | ptr_nonnull_check      | bool f(block) = **(p+8)==*(p+0xc); seed both |
| 0x005aeda0 | FUN_005aeda0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005ab710_005af040/0x005aeda0.md   | int_ptr2_out           | void f(a,b,hi,lo): 64-bit fixed shift-add mul; compare hi/lo |
| 0x005b0700 | FUN_005b0700 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005af070_005b2190/0x005b0700.md   | int_pair               | int f(p1,thresh): list min-qualifying payload (key chain *(*(pl+0x54)+0x10)) |

# Verification: py -3.12 re/frida/run_diff_warm.py <the 7 hook names> --slots 4
# (see PER-SESSION PROTOCOL header for full workflow)


================================================================================

# Candidates
| RVA        | name         | analysis note                                            | arg_type (confirm)    | reimpl sketch |
|------------|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------|---------------|
| 0x005b2fd0 | FUN_005b2fd0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b2220_005b8570/0x005b2fd0.md | int_with_out_ptr      | int f(ctx,idx,p3,p4,out): arithmetic projector over tables@+0x10/+0x18 stride@+0x20 |
| 0x005b3580 | FUN_005b3580 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b2220_005b8570/0x005b3580.md | void_write_observe     | void f(hdr): list-header init [0]=0,[1]=[2]=&[1]; observe 3 writes |
| 0x005b35a0 | FUN_005b35a0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b2220_005b8570/0x005b35a0.md | audio_list_insert/int_pair | void f(hdr,obj): push-back (node@+0x20/+0x24); observe link writes |
| 0x005b3670 | FUN_005b3670 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b2220_005b8570/0x005b3670.md | int_pair               | int* f(hdr,key): find-by-field node[-2]==key -> obj base/NULL |
| 0x005b36b0 | FUN_005b36b0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b2220_005b8570/0x005b36b0.md | int_pair               | int* f(hdr,pos): index-by-position (count@[0]) -> obj/NULL |
| 0x005b4060 | FUN_005b4060 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b2220_005b8570/0x005b4060.md | int_pair               | int f(fmtA,fmtB): FP sample-rate ratio scale + ROUND (rate@+0,bits@+0xc,chan@+0xd,size@+8) |

# Verification: py -3.12 re/frida/run_diff_warm.py <the 6 hook names> --slots 4

# Candidates
| RVA        | name         | analysis note                                            | arg_type (confirm)   | reimpl sketch |
|------------|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------|----------------------|---------------|
| 0x005b73b0 | FUN_005b73b0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b2220_005b8570/0x005b73b0.md | none (char*)          | char* f(s): string find-extension; pass literal C string, compare returned offset |
| 0x005b9410 | FUN_005b9410 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b8be0_005bcb80/0x005b9410.md | void_write_observe     | void f(src,loop): SOFTWARE path (caps+0x50&8==0); seed +0x94->caps bit clear; observe +0x28 bit 0x800 |
| 0x005baf40 | FUN_005baf40 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b8be0_005bcb80/0x005baf40.md | void_setter_observe    | void f(p1,v): SOFTWARE path (+0x78&8==0) -> *(p1+0x3c)=v; seed flag clear, observe write |
| 0x005bb5b0 | FUN_005bb5b0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b8be0_005bcb80/0x005bb5b0.md | bytes_inplace_3        | void f(out,srcA,srcB,nbytes): saturated 16-bit PCM add; seed 2 src bufs, compare out |
| 0x005bc450 | FUN_005bc450 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b8be0_005bcb80/0x005bc450.md | slot_block_zero        | void f(p1): zero [0],[1]; observe 8-byte clear |
| 0x005bcb80 | FUN_005bcb80 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005b8be0_005bcb80/0x005bcb80.md | void_write_observe     | void f(tag,guidOut): write MEDIASUBTYPE GUID {tag-0000-0010-8000-00AA00389B71}; observe 16B |

# Verification: py -3.12 re/frida/run_diff_warm.py <the 6 hook names> --slots 4

| 0x005bfcc0 | FUN_005bfcc0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005bf4d0_005c9770/0x005bfcc0.md | int_ptr2_out        | int f(p1,o1,o2): pure getter, seed +0x15c/+0x160; out field + diff as 64-bit |

| 0x005c75b0 | FUN_005c75b0 | re/analysis/bucket_audio_005bf4d0_005c9770/0x005c75b0.md | int_scalar/ptr      | u4 f(p1) = *(p1+0x8c); seed scratch +0x8c |

# Verification: py -3.12 re/frida/run_diff_warm.py <the 6 hook names> --slots 4


================================================================================
Session 5 — util_c3_ab5  (C2->C3, 8-function batch)   [Util/UtilLeaves_ab5.cpp]
================================================================================
Model: Sonnet 4.6 (claude-sonnet-4-6) — hard cap 8 (this session: 8)
Worktree: .worktrees/c3-batch-ab-s5/  (branch c3/batch-ab-s5)
Reimpl file: mashedmod/src/mashed_re/Util/UtilLeaves_ab5.cpp

# Candidates (global-init / setter leaves — harness seeds + reads back the cited globals)
| RVA        | name         | analysis note                                  | arg_type (confirm)    | reimpl sketch |
|------------|--------------|------------------------------------------------|-----------------------|---------------|
| 0x00407a60 | FUN_00407a60 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont1_a/0x00407a60.md     | void_step_global       | void f(): init table @0x008a9620 (zero 0xc3 dwords + 0xffffffff@+0x28, stride 0x30c, <0x8aa278) |
| 0x0040ad30 | FUN_0040ad30 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont1_a/0x0040ad30.md     | void_setter_observe    | void f(v): *0x008a95ac = v |
| 0x0040b250 | FUN_0040b250 | re/analysis/game_state_d5_cont2/0x0040b250.md  | void_step_global       | void f(): write -1000 to 8 globals 0x008a9500..0x008a952c |
| 0x0040b430 | FUN_0040b430 | re/analysis/game_state/0x0040b430.md           | entity_field_add       | void f(idx,delta): idx>3 ? 0x008a94fc : (&0x008a94f0)[idx] += delta |
| 0x0040b6d0 | FUN_0040b6d0 | re/analysis/game_state/0x0040b6d0.md           | read_global            | int f(idx) = (&0x008a94e0)[idx]; seed array, compare return |
| 0x004292c0 | sub_004292c0 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont1_b/0x004292c0.md     | void_write_observe     | void f(p,v): *p = v; scratch buffer + value |
| 0x0042aab0 | sub_0042aab0 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont1_b/0x0042aab0.md     | void_step_global       | void f(): *0x00898a90=0x180; *0x00898ab0=0 |
| 0x00430b00 | TimeDisplay::SetEntry | re/analysis/leaderboard_d2/0x00430b00.md | multi_arg_global_write | void f(p1,p2,a,b,c): idx=(p2+p1*2)*0xc; write a/b/c to 0x008989e0+idx{+0,+4,+8} |

# Verification: py -3.12 re/frida/run_diff_warm.py <the 8 hook names> --slots 4


================================================================================
Session 6 — util_c3_ab6  (C2->C3, 7-function batch incl. the fastcall_reg CANARY)
================================================================================
Model: Sonnet 4.6 (claude-sonnet-4-6) — hard cap 8 (this session: 7)
Worktree: .worktrees/c3-batch-ab-s6/  (branch c3/batch-ab-s6)
Reimpl file: mashedmod/src/mashed_re/Util/UtilLeaves_ab6.cpp

# Candidates
| RVA        | name         | analysis note                                  | arg_type (confirm)  | reimpl sketch |
|------------|--------------|------------------------------------------------|---------------------|---------------|
| 0x004425d0 | FUN_004425d0 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont1_b/0x004425d0.md     | void_step_global     | void f(): zero elem[0] of array@0x008964c0 stride 0xD8 (<0x897fc0), then zero 0x0089898c |
| 0x0045c480 | FUN_0045c480 | re/analysis/timer_d2_cont1/0x0045c480.md       | void_step_global     | void f(): zero 11 named globals + 36-dword block @0x0088f5e0 |
| 0x0046b4f0 | FUN_0046b4f0 | re/analysis/profile_career_d3/FUN_0046b4f0.md  | int_ptr2_out/out3_idx | int f(out,o,i): bounds o<16,i<18 else 0; copy 3 dwords from 0x008815a0+o*0xD04+i*0xC+0x60 to out[0..2], ret 1 |
| 0x004904d0 | FUN_004904d0 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont2/0x004904d0.md       | void_step_global     | void f(): zero elem[0] of 30 elems @0x0086A4A0 stride 0x50 (<0x86AE00) |
| 0x004d8560 | FUN_004d8560 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont2/0x004d8560.md       | none                 | int f() = 1 (MOV EAX,1; RET); compare return |
| 0x0055dec0 | FUN_0055dec0 | re/analysis/timer_d3_cont2/0x0055dec0.md       | eax_implicit_ptr     | int f(p) = *p; seeded scratch ptr, compare dword |
| 0x004a1790 | FUN_004a1790 | re/analysis/video_mci/0x004a1790.md            | **fastcall_reg** (CANARY) | COM-Release __fastcall(ECX=ptr): p=*ecx; if(p) ((void(__thiscall*)(void*))(*(void**)p)[2])(p) |

# *** CANARY 0x004a1790 — validates the new fastcall_reg arg_type. Registry entry: ***
#   'rva': 0x004a1790, 'export': 'ComReleaseThunk', 'arg_type': 'fastcall_reg',
#   'signature': {'ret': 'uint32', 'args': []}, 'lut_root_delta': 0,
#   'fastcall_nargs': 1, 'fastcall_ecx_ptr': True,
#   'path1_tests': [0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7],   # markers; harness allocates a zeroed 64B scratch buf per test
#   'path2_tests': [0,1,2]
#   With a ZEROED scratch buffer, *ecx==0 -> the null-check returns without the vtable call:
#   orig and reimpl both no-op -> bit-identical. This proves ECX marshalling + stack balance.
#   Reimpl (cdecl export wrapping the same logic): read the note 0x004a1790.md; the body is
#   `param_1=*param_1; if(param_1) (**(code**)(*param_1+8))(param_1);` — i.e. vtable slot 2.
#   If this diffs GREEN, fastcall_reg is validated (unblocks ~93 future candidates).

# Verification: py -3.12 re/frida/run_diff_warm.py <the 7 hook names> --slots 4


################################################################################
# DEFERRED (not in this batch — for the user's awareness)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#  - boot pure-leaves (46): ALL msvc-crt band (bucket_005c1d63). RECLASS-OUT to
#    third-party-library[msvc-crt] in a separate library-tagging pass — NOT C3.
#  - audio SKIPs (29): DirectSound/DirectShow COM-method thunks (need live COM
#    interfaces — can't synthetic-force-call) + ole32/kernel32 thunks (library) +
#    5 inline-[UNCERTAIN] blockers (U-6707/7115/7124/7137/7204 — resolve first).
#  - util SKIPs (7): 4 Tick/dispatchers (0x0040fc00 Race::Tick, 0x00412f30,
#    0x00429310 TimeTrial::Tick, 0x004299d0 — not real leaves / live-state) +
#    3 CRT (__strtok 0x004a3ac9, __alldiv 0x004a4170, __allmul 0x004a4220).
#  Full per-RVA classification: re/analysis/plans/c3_survey_{passed,rejected}.tsv
#  + the two subagent classifications captured in the 2026-06-04 session.
#
# END c3_batch_ab.txt — 40 RVAs / 6 sessions. After all 6 commit: run frida-sweep.
# This batch validates run_diff_warm.py (warm pool) + fastcall_reg (canary). The
# next batch can go Opus high-throughput once the viable pool is widened (resolve
# the audio inline-UNCERTAINs; extend the harness for the COM-thunk family; or
# pull render's 119 pure-leaves with the observe-style arg_types).
################################################################################
